qa.a: Cybernauts is a top-tier AI implementations company focused on value engineering, web development, and digital transformation. We help businesses innovate and grow using AI, mobile apps, websites, design, and marketing.
Cybernauts is headquartered in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India.

qa.q: How long has Cybernauts been in business?
qa.a: Cybernauts has over 5 years of experience in the industry.

qa.q: How many projects has Cybernauts delivered?
qa.a: Cybernauts has completed 60+ projects, delivered 28+ AI solutions, and impacted over 1 million users.
You can reach Cybernauts via email at info@cybernauts.it or WhatsApp/phone at +91 9990861759.

Cybernauts offers AI Integration (AI implementations, AI agents, chatbots, automations, LLM fine-tuning), Mobile App Development (iOS, Android, React Native, Cordova), Web Development (JavaScript/ReactJS, Python/Node.js, Java/PHP, SQL/NoSQL databases, cloud infrastructure/DevOps), Design Services (prototyping, UX, logo & branding, mobile/web design), and SAP Technical Services (intelligent BASIS support, data archiving, AI-driven SAP optimization, SAP ABAP automation).
Yes — Cybernauts builds AI-powered mobile apps for iOS and Android, including React Native and Cordova (hybrid) apps.

qa.q: Does Cybernauts do AI chatbot or AI agent development?
qa.a: Yes — this is one of Cybernauts' core specialties, including AI agents, chatbots, workflow automation, and LLM fine-tuning.
Yes — Cybernauts builds web applications using JavaScript/ReactJS, Python/Node.js, Java/PHP, SQL/NoSQL databases, and handles cloud infrastructure and DevOps.
Yes — Cybernauts provides prototyping, UX design, logo & branding, and mobile/web design services.

qa.q: Does Cybernauts work with SAP systems?
qa.a: Yes — Cybernauts provides SAP technical services including intelligent BASIS support, data archiving with predictive insights, AI-driven SAP optimization, and SAP ABAP automation.

qa.q: What AI technologies does Cybernauts specialize in?
qa.a: Cybernauts specializes in AI-powered software engineering (RAG, embeddings, vLLM), LLM & generative AI solutions (fine-tuning, chatbots, DPO), intelligent automation (AI agents, MCP, workflows), enterprise AI deployment (OpenAI, Bedrock, private cloud), optimized AI inference (TensorRT, ONNX, quantization), and multimodal AI systems (vision, audio, NLP).

qa.q: Can I speak to a human / real person?
qa.a: Of course — I can connect you with someone from the Cybernauts team. You can also reach them directly at info@cybernauts.it or +91 9990861759.

qa.q: Does Cybernauts have client references or case studies?
qa.a: Yes — Cybernauts has worked with clients such as Broomees, Lexcomply, Acumen Juris, Nema AI, 4Climate, Fortunexa, HopeQure, and others. Case studies and projects can be viewed on cybernauts.in/projects.
